name: Mutual NDA
description: Common Paper standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement. Allows each party to disclose confidential information to the other for a specified purpose, with mutual obligations to protect that information.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page template for the Common Paper Mutual NDA, containing fillable fields for party details, purpose, term, confidentiality period, governing law, and signatures.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement (CSA). Comprehensive SaaS agreement covering service access, restrictions, privacy, payment, term, warranties, liability, indemnification, and confidentiality.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Service Level Agreement (SLA). Defines uptime targets, response time commitments, service credits, and remedies for cloud service performance.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement. Governs early product access for design partners who provide feedback to help develop and improve a product.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement (PSA). Covers consulting and professional services engagements including deliverables, intellectual property, payment, and warranties.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Data Processing Agreement (DPA). Governs the processing of personal data in compliance with GDPR and other data protection laws, including subprocessor management and cross-border transfers.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement. Covers business partnerships including mutual obligations, trademark licensing, payment, confidentiality, and indemnification.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement. Governs on-premise or installable software licensing including usage rights, restrictions, updates, payment, warranties, and IP protection.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement. Provides a framework for trial or evaluation access to a product before entering into a longer-term definitive agreement.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement (BAA). Governs the use and protection of Protected Health Information (PHI) in compliance with HIPAA requirements.

name: AI Addendum
description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum. Supplements an existing agreement to address AI-specific concerns including model training restrictions, input/output ownership, and AI service disclaimers.
